title: THC's Small Tools
description: Adds smaller textures for Axes, Picks, Shovels, and Hoes.
body:
![Thunderchuck's Smaller Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc7b0b559ccb06199b268550b79b12646afc75d4.png)

THC's Smaller Tools makes it so that all tools will take up less screen space which will improve your overall Minecraft exprience.
